Bug / Task Description: ComputePriorityResolution selects the wrong winner when two eligible devices tie on EffectiveScore. The intended, documented behavior is that an exact score tie is broken deterministically in favor of the lexicographically smaller DeviceID, but the current ordering resolves ties to the larger DeviceID, so the wrong device wins. Fix the tie-break so that on equal EffectiveScore the candidate with the smallest DeviceID is chosen as the winner.
Commit Subject: fix(priority): break score ties by smallest DeviceID
